purpose: Verify that an AIP Ed25519 identity can derive X25519 keys compatible with qntm's encrypted transport

references.key_derivation: RFC 7748 §4.1 (Ed25519 → X25519 birational map via libsodium)

vectors.name: aip_identity_to_qntm_x25519_1
vectors.description: Derive X25519 public key from AIP Ed25519 identity (RFC 8032 seed #1)

vectors.name: aip_identity_to_qntm_x25519_2
vectors.description: Derive X25519 public key from AIP Ed25519 identity (RFC 8032 seed #2)

vectors.name: aip_identity_to_qntm_x25519_3
vectors.description: Derive X25519 public key from AIP Ed25519 identity (RFC 8032 seed #3)

quick_start.description: Verify AIP → qntm key derivation in 5 lines of Python

steps: 1. AIP agent creates Ed25519 identity (existing: AgentIdentity)
3. Join qntm conversation via invite token (HKDF → conversation keys)
4. Send/receive XChaCha20-Poly1305 encrypted messages via relay
5. Verify sender identity using did:aip + qntm entity verification
